title: Copenhagen, Capital Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Copenhagen is a city in Capital Region with a population of 794,000. Denmark’s hygge-filled capital, a cycling paradise known for its colorful Nyhavn harbor, Tivoli Gardens, and Michelin-starred restaurants.
